title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Metro Shoes

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Metro Shoes
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
